events.title: YES AND! Comedy Improv
events.description:
YES AND – Comedy Improv at Sayuri

Comedy Improv is where we learn how to be creative in the moment and enjoy whatever emerges. It’s about saying yes, trusting your instincts, supporting each other, and discovering just how playful and imaginative you really are.

🕔 Mondays – 4:30-6:30 pm at Sayuri 

Sessions are held in English. No experience necessary. Free to attend (donation-based).

Come join us as we stretch our imaginations, connect through laughter, and build spontaneous stories together in a safe, supportive space.

This activity is organised by participants, with a different person stepping up to facilitate each week. It’s community-powered, collaborative, and lightly held.

 

⸻

 What to Expect

Each gathering follows a simple, welcoming format:

- Warm-Up Exercises (45 mins) Playful games to awaken awareness of body, space, each other, and spontaneity. We loosen up, tune in, and get out of our heads.

- Improv Scenarios (45 mins) Guided premises and playful structures that shape our improvised scenes. From silly to sincere, we explore character, story, and surprise.

- Closing Circle (15 mins) A gentle reflection on what we experienced and what we discovered — about ourselves, creativity, and connection.

Whether you’re brand new or seasoned on stage, you’re welcome. Bring your curiosity, your courage, and your inner jester.

Yes, and… see you there.

events.title: Tarot Intensive Masterclass Level 1 & 2
events.description:
Bundle Masterclass: Tarot Mastery – From Basics to Intuition

Take a complete journey into the world of Tarot with Bude Novi’s two-part masterclass bundle (Level 1 and Level 2)! Designed to guide you from beginner to advanced reader, this series offers everything you need to confidently master Tarot. You will:

 
 Build a strong foundation by learning the 78 cards and their meanings.

 
 
 Practice both basic and advanced Tarot spreads.

 
 
 Discover how Tarot connects with Chakra energy for profound readings.

 
 
 Strengthen your intuition and sensory awareness for intuitive mastery.

 

This bundle is your ultimate pathway to becoming a skilled Tarot reader!

* The class will include an online module and a deck of tarot cards

 

Schedule:

Level 1 = 10:00 am - 12:30pm

break 12:30pm - 1:30pm

Level 2 = 1:30pm - 4:00pm

 

Tarot Masterclass Level 1: Unlock the Secrets of the Cards

Step into the enchanting world of Tarot with Bude Novi! Perfect for beginners and curious minds, this masterclass lays the foundation for reading Tarot with confidence. You will:

 
 Discover the history and fundamentals of Tarot.

 
 
 Learn the meaning behind the 78 cards (Major & Minor Arcana).

 
 
 Master the basics of reading Tarot for yourself and others.

 
 
 Practice essential spreads to start your Tarot journey.

 

 

Tarot Masterclass Level 2: Intuition, Energy & Advanced Spreads

Elevate your Tarot practice to new heights with this immersive masterclass! Ideal for those who know the basics, this session explores the spiritual and intuitive side of Tarot. You will:

 
 Understand the connection between Tarot cards and Chakra energy.

 
 
 Dive into advanced spreads for deeper readings.

 
 
 Enhance your intuition and senses for a stronger Tarot connection.

 
 
 Use Tarot as a tool for spiritual insight and personal transformation.

 

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Noviana Kusumawardhani, affectionately known as Bude Novi, is a highly experienced and intuitive Tarot Card Reader who has been guiding individuals on their life journeys since 2007. With over 16,000 Tarot readings delivered to clients around the globe, she combines deep insight, empathy, and spiritual wisdom to empower and support personal growth.

In addition to her one-on-one readings, Bude Novi leads Tarot and Self-Growth Empowerment workshops across Indonesia, inspiring participants to tap into their intuition and uncover their inner strength.

events.title: Practical Magic
events.description:
Join Cat Kabira in one of her most favorite subjects in the world: energy work, magic, and how to make it work for you. Why energy work is the most practical way to care for yourself and show up in life. Whether you’re new to learning with Cat or a long-term student, she’ll always share new material to sparkle and uplevel your world.

In our time together we’ll dive into:

Understanding your own energy field

How to strengthen it and why that’s so essential

Why grounding is a gamechanger

How to manage yourself if you’re an empath or highly sensitive

and more!

This workshop is a mixture of practices you can take home and use to empower you in your life as well as some lectures to give you context. You’ll learn ways to support yourself when you feel anxious or overwhelmed and also how to own your field differently so that you feel safer (and playful and wanting to engage!) in the world.

This is the place to come with an open mind and heart. Bring all of your questions. Come willing to practice and learn new ways and leave feeling empowered, joyful, and excited to look at reality in a whole new way. This is great if you are new to energy work and also fantastic if you’re a coach, teacher, healer, psychologist, parent or anyone ready to deepen your connection to the subtle energetic world.

**Please noted bring your own notebook and pencil/pen.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Cat's been practicing and teaching energy work and yoga for 25+ years and initially got into the work as a way to transform her own trauma. She's highly sensitive and intuitive and gifted in taking you on a multidimensional journey. She's from the US and has been based in Bali for the last 15 years while traveling the world sharing her gifts. She has just recently moved to Portugal.

events.title: Awaken Your Voice: Sing Your Heart Open
events.description:
Sing Your Heart Open in a playful and supportive singing experience that helps you reconnect with your natural voice and the joy of expressing yourself through song.

Many of us learned to soften, shrink, or hold back our expression. Over time these patterns can settle into the body as tension in the jaw, throat, and chest.

In this workshop, singing becomes a pathway back to natural and authentic expression.

Through guided vocal activation, breath, gentle movement, and group singing, we explore how the voice begins to open when the body feels supported and relaxed.

Together we will:

 
 release tension in the jaw, throat, and chest

 
 
 explore your natural voice through simple songs and vocal play

 
 
 build confidence expressing yourself in a supportive group space

 
 
 experience the grounding and joy of singing together

 

This space is not about performing or sounding perfect.

It’s about reconnecting with the voice that is already yours.

Whether you love singing, feel shy about your voice, or are simply curious to explore it again, you are welcome.

No singing experience is needed — just curiosity and a willingness to explore.

Expect simple songs, guided vocal exploration, and the powerful experience of voices joining together.

Come explore your voice in a space where singing is natural, playful, and shared.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Francie, the inspired founder of the award-winning Pure Flow Yoga school, voted top 8 Retreat worldwide by the Guardian, is a trauma-informed Yoga professional, free-spirited flow artist, sacred sounds musician, vocal activation guide, and sound healer.

Francie has guided thousands globally on 200+ transformative Yoga retreats and teacher trainings, and is featured on international festivals as a performer, musician, teacher, and event organizer.

Francie mentors Yogis, artists, and creators in life, business, and voice and help conscious businesses cultivate more flow.

With a background in Psychology and Education, Francie is passionate about exploring the harmony between Yoga, Voice, and Trauma Integration for self-discovery, empowerment, and authentic expression.

She is a devoted seeker and eternal student of life, having studied extensively with global master teachers, and currently pursuing studies in Compassionate Inquiry, a somatic psychotherapeutic approach to trauma resolution

An educator at heart, Francie is passionate about sharing the profound power of healing through music. Creating safe spaces, she guides people to experience deep joy, connection and authentic expression, fostering community and self-worth.

Based in Ubud, Bali, Francie offers 1:1 mentorships, transformative retreats, trainings, and weekly classes at the renowned Yoga Barn.

events.title: Building Your Path: Spiritual Growth and Daily Practice
events.description:
Discover a spiritual path that feels true to you in this 3-hour workshop designed to help you navigate the diverse world of spiritual practices. Whether you’re just beginning your journey or seeking clarity on your next steps, this workshop offers the tools and guidance you need to move forward with confidence.

We’ll explore both traditional and non-traditional spiritual paths, discussing who they are well-suited for and who might benefit from alternative approaches. Through guided reflection, group discussion, and practical exercises with Jana, you’ll uncover your motivations and inspirations, helping you connect more deeply with your “why.” This process is about being open and curious to what resonates with you, free from judgment or expectation.

A focus of the workshop will be on creating a daily sadhana practice, a foundational routine that supports your spiritual growth. You’ll receive practical advice on building a practice that fits your lifestyle, along with insights into how consistency and intention can transform your experience.

Throughout the workshop, you’ll be encouraged to explore what’s possible for you, with the space to reflect, ask questions, and connect with others on a similar journey. By the end, you’ll leave with a clearer understanding of your spiritual needs, tools to create or refine a daily practice, and a sense of direction for moving forward.

Please bring a journal to this workshop. Writing will be a valuable tool for capturing your reflections, insights, and action steps. Come with an open heart and a curious mind, ready to explore what feels authentic and meaningful to you. This workshop is perfect for anyone seeking a deeper connection to their spiritual path, no matter where they are on their journey.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Jana Johnson is a seasoned teacher, healer, and guide with over 20 years of experience in exploring spiritual traditions and energy work. Her journey has taken her through practices including Buddhism, South American earth-based traditions, Vedic teachings, and intuitive energy healing. Jana has studied with master teachers in Bali, India, and beyond, cultivating a deep understanding of spiritual growth and self-realization.

Her work blends ancient wisdom with practical tools, helping individuals uncover their unique spiritual paths. Jana’s approach is grounded in the belief that spirituality is personal and unique to each individual, and her workshops are designed to inspire curiosity, connection, and clarity.

Every night is different — different sounds, different people, different energy.

FRIDAY | 8-10 PM | CATUR HARI WIJAYA

World Music & Afro Java Psychedelic

Catur Hari Wijaya is a multi-instrumentalist, composer, songwriter, drum teacher, and sound nomad whose musical journey has touched communities across the world.

Drawing deep inspiration from the rich traditions of Indonesia, India, the Middle East, North Africa, and West Africa, Catur weaves a sonic tapestry that bridges ancestral rhythms with contemporary expression.

His music blends unique string instruments, shimmering flutes, earthy percussion, and indigenous melodies into vibrant soundscapes carrying the wisdom of the world. Each performance is a curated journey through sound — uniting original compositions with timeless traditional songs.

The result is an invitation to lose yourself in groove and rhythm — a celebration of the nomadic spirit where music and dance become one.

Catur released his debut album Bali to Mali in 2021, tracing a musical and spiritual journey from Indonesia to West Africa. He is currently working on his upcoming album KOSMOS, exploring new instruments and more immersive, transformative soundscapes.

Come for the food, stay for the music — or the other way around.

Eat. Listen. Dance.

events.title: Ceremonial Breathwork with Viktoria
events.description:
Ceremonial Breathwork

a morning nervous system reset

Trauma-informed • Nervous system friendly • Emotionally supportive  

Join us for a deeply held ceremonial breathwork experience — a safe and intentional space to reconnect with yourself beyond the noise of everyday life.

This trauma-informed and nervous system friendly journey is designed to gently guide you inward. Through conscious connected breathwork you’ll be supported in softening mental layers, releasing stored emotional tension and reconnecting with the intelligence of your body.

The session is guided primarily through intentional nose-inhale breathwork. Nasal breathing supports nervous system regulation, safety and grounded presence, while still allowing access to meaningful emotional release and deep inner exploration.

Breath is one of the most powerful bridges between the conscious and subconscious. In this immersive experience, we work with the breath as a tool for inner exploration, emotional release and self-remembering. Many participants experience clarity, emotional breakthroughs and a renewed sense of connection to themselves and life.

This is not about pushing or forcing — it’s about allowing. The space is held with deep care and respect for your unique process.  Whether you’re seeking healing, insight, grounding or simply a moment to return home to yourself, this journey meets you exactly where you are.

What this journey may support:

• Emotional release and inner clarity

• Nervous system regulation and deep relaxation

• Reconnection with your body and intuition

• Letting go of stored tension or stagnant energy

• A deeper sense of peace, presence, and authenticity

No prior breathwork experience is needed — only an open mind and willingness to explore.

This event is open to all — men and women are equally welcome.

Come as you are. Breathe. Release. Remember.

––––––––––

Important Safety Information

To support a safe and comfortable experience, please:

- arrive min. 10 minutes before the session starts

- come in comfortable clothing

- avoid eating a heavy meal 1–2 hours before the session

- bring a sarong and an eye mask with you

While breathwork is generally safe, this session may not be suitable for individuals with:

• Severe cardiovascular conditions

• Uncontrolled high blood pressure

• Epilepsy or seizure disorders

• Severe asthma or respiratory conditions

• Recent major surgery

• Pregnancy

• Diagnosed severe psychiatric conditions (such as psychosis or schizophrenia)

If you are unsure whether this practice is appropriate for you, please reach out prior to attending. You’re welcome to contact Viktoria directly via Instagram at @viki.wonders to discuss any questions or concerns.

About the Facilitator

Viktoria is a certified breathwork facilitator holding grounded, emotionally supportive spaces where participants feel safe to explore at their own pace. She hosts breathwork workshops, retreats and private sessions in Bali and across Europe, weaving together depth, safety and a refined ceremonial touch.

events.description:
Standup Comedy Workshop + Open Mic

Ever thought about trying standup comedy… but felt nervous, unsure, or terrified?

Yintelligence is an introspective experience where we move from the static to the ecstatic, where we find inspiration from the stillness of yin poses and explore how we can move more within them. This practice is infusing slow movement, mobility therapy, and somatic yin into a more sustainable, inclusive, and adaptable practice and opens up for a deeper understanding of the human body.

This training is open for both teachers and students, where we will learn about joint health, myofascial relaxation, soft strength, and allowing the shape of water to inspire us to move more freely.  Lymphatic massage techniques.

events.description:
Experience why this course is described as “TRULY EXTRAORDINARY” and “ABSOLUTELY LIFE-CHANGING.” This transformational program accelerates growth through powerful healing processes that shift consciousness, unlocking prosperity and fulfillment. Meditate to cleanse your energy body, dissolve blockages, and release old patterns. Discover peace of mind and personal growth. Embrace the opportunity to learn and share Deeksha, a powerful blessing that inspires clarity and transformation. Step into a journey of profound healing and lasting positive change.

Benefits:

 Heal relationships with your parents, partner, ex-partner(s),
 children and inner child
 Release emotional blocks, addictions, or disempowering habits
 Manifest the life you truly desire
 Become a Blessing Giver and share transformative energy

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Punnu Wasu is an Indian singer, multi-instrumentalist, and teacher deeply rooted in kirtan and spiritual practices. Growing up in India, he began his musical journey at age 5, learning harmonium and vocals from his father, a respected kirtan singer. His passion for music and spirituality grew as he studied Hindustani classical music and various instruments under renowned teachers.

Today, Punnu performs worldwide, offering a unique blend of Kirtan, Xtatic Kirtan, Indian Fusion, Classical music, Sufi, Bollywood, and world music. His soulful voice and dynamic style captivate audiences. As a dedicated teacher, he leads his Kirtan and Sound Healing Academy and is featured in the documentary The Power of Mantra, highlighting the transformative power of sound and mantra.

Beyond music, Punnu has devoted his life to yoga, meditation, and holistic healing practices, beginning his journey as a young teenager under the guidance of masters throughout India and beyond. He shares his profound knowledge through meditation teacher trainings and advanced trainings, guiding students toward deeper spiritual growth and the transformative benefits of meditation.

With over 30 years of experience, Punnu is also a Grand Master in Usui and Karuna Reiki, offering private Reiki sessions and trainings worldwide. His holistic approach integrates spiritual counselling and various holistic healing methods, ensuring a comprehensive path to well-being.

A lifelong learner, Punnu has been teaching at The Yoga Barn in Bali since 2012 and is now based in Bali and Switzerland. Through his music, teachings, and compassionate presence, he unites spirituality, healing, and music, inspiring profound transformation in those he touches.

Come as you are.

Leave more fully yourself—and gently rooted in your own inner teacher.

events.title: Acroyoga Teacher Training Level One
events.description:
What is acroyoga?

Acroyoga is the blend of yoga, acrobatics, and human connection. We will defy gravity in acrobatic asana, handstands, and focus on postural alignment. Safety, teamwork and play are at the heart of the practice.

What you'll learn

You’ll build a strong foundation in acroyoga principles, including basing, flying and spotting. We will explore safe movement practices, handstands, and dynamic transitions. To keep your yoga practice balanced we’ll explore therapeutic practices such as Thai yoga massage, restorative flying, and partner yoga. Your confidence in yourself will grow as you learn communication techniques and consent practices. We will dive into embodying practical teaching methodology, intelligent progressions, clear cuing & sequencing and applied anatomy to help you move & teach with ease.

Who's this training for?

This training is for anyone who wants to learn and deepen their acro practice and/or yoga teachers looking to expand their offerings. No partner or experience necessary.

Sample Schedule 

 (9:00 - 10:00) Handstand practice
 (10:00 - 10:15) Break
 (10:15 - 12:15) Acroyoga practice
 (12:15 - 1:45) Lunch & personal practice
 (1:45 - 2:30) Theory
 (2:30 - 4:00) Acroyoga practice
 (4:00 - 4:15) Break 
 (4:15 - 5:15) Principles of teaching
 (5:15 - 6:15) Teaching practice
 (6:15 - 6:30) Break
 (6:30 - 7:30) Restorative session

(Schedule is subject to change)

What you'll learn and leave with

 50hr YACEP Yoga Alliance continued education 
 Certification of completion
 Have an understanding of acroyoga foundations
 Know the mechanics of basing, flying, and spotting
 How to manage a classroom with safety as the focus
 Understanding of skill progressions for both acro & handstands
 Become a more confident practitioner and teacher
 Restorative practices as a part of your tool belt

events.title: Face Yoga & Facial Anatomy Training
events.description:
Face Yoga & Facial Anatomy - 25h Teacher Training 

An advanced pathway that integrates the study of facial anatomy with Face Yoga practices based on targeted muscle activation and self-massage techniques. A complete training to teach safely and effectively, supporting tone, balance, and natural well-being.

UNDERSTAND & INTEGRATE :

 Understand the anatomy and physiology of the face and neck.
 Assess individual needs and propose targeted exercises.
 Avoid potentially harmful techniques.
 Teach Face Yoga safely and effectively.
 Create personalised pathways based on age and goals.
 Guide practitioners toward greater self-awareness and acceptance.

EMBODY

To guide you into becoming a Face Yoga teacher who leads with knowledge, presence, and care—able to offer safe, effective, and truly nurturing practices that support tone, balance, and natural radiance over time.

This training is a pathway of correct self-care: you will learn the anatomy and physiology of the face and neck (including TMJ safety, lymphatic and circulatory flow, skin and tissue changes), so you can practise and teach with respect for the body—never forcing, never harming. Through targeted muscle activation, gentle release of tension, self-massage, breath, and posture, you’ll learn how to design personalised sequences that meet people where they are, helping them feel more at home in their face, more aware, and more accepting of their natural changes—without fear, without pressure, with kindness.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Vittoria Santoliquido is a dentist and aesthetic doctor, and a Yoga Alliance certified yoga instructor. With a background in anatomy and the science of tissue aging, she brings a clinical, safety first lens to natural facial practices and pairs it with the grounded, mindful approach of yoga. Her method integrates facial anatomy education, targeted muscle activation, self massage, acupressure-inspired touch, and lymphatic-friendly routines, always emphasizing posture, breath, and nervous system regulation. Vittoria believes that true radiance starts with presence: the ability to meet your own reflection with kindness and curiosity. Empower your glow from the inside out!.

events.title: End of Illusion
events.description:
End of Illusion

A Direct Exploration of Perception and Reality

Most of what we struggle with isn’t life itself – it’s the way it’s perceived. We don’t experience reality directly, but through layers of interpretation, conditioning, and past experience. Over time, these filters become so familiar that they feel like truth. Much of the tension, confusion, and reactivity we carry comes not from what’s happening – but from how it’s being seen.

End of Illusion is a space to explore this directly.

Rather than adding new concepts or beliefs, this workshop invites you into a more immediate way of seeing—through guided inquiry and embodied awareness. You’ll begin to recognize how perception forms in real time, how it shapes your experience, and how certain patterns create unnecessary resistance.

As these patterns are seen clearly, something begins to shift. Not through effort or analysis—but through simple recognition. What often follows is a natural sense of clarity and ease:

 
 less reactivity in situations that once felt charged

 
 
 a quieter, more spacious relationship to thoughts

 
 
 a deeper trust in your direct experience

 

This is not about changing your life. It’s about seeing it more clearly – and discovering what remains when the filters begin to fall away.

What to Expect

 
 Guided explorations into perception and awareness

 
 
 Simple, yet powerful embodied practices

 
 
 Real-time recognition of patterns as they arise

 
 
 Space for reflection and questions

 

Who This Is For

For those who feel ready to move beyond understanding – and begin seeing directly.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Cirak is a five-time author and the creator of InnerPower™ Spiritual Teachings. He is a certified meditation, Reiki, and Qi Gong teacher, a graduate of the Eckhart Tolle School of Awakening, and has been featured on over 100 podcasts. With over 25 years of experience, Cirak brings consciousness into everyday living. His deep insights and passionate storytelling make every event memorable.

events.title: Making Life Meaningful
events.description:
Most people go through life searching—chasing goals, experiences, and answers—only to find themselves feeling unfulfilled. But meaning isn’t something you find; it’s something you create. Making Life Meaningful is not just another workshop—it’s a shift in perspective, a deep reexamination of how you experience and engage with life.

In this immersive experience, you’ll explore powerful insights, practical tools, and thought-provoking discussions designed to help you make better decisions, navigate challenges with clarity, and bring a deeper sense of purpose to your everyday life. This isn’t about chasing enlightenment or escaping the present—it’s about understanding the design of life and aligning yourself with it.

You’ll learn how to:

• Stop reacting to life and start responding with intention.

• Break free from the mental loops that keep you stuck.

• See beyond surface-level problems to the deeper patterns at play.

• Make decisions with clarity, confidence, and purpose.

• Find meaning in every moment—not just in big milestones.

This workshop is for those who are ready to step beyond the ordinary, to see life through a sharper lens, and to cultivate a sense of meaning that isn’t dependent on circumstances. Whether you feel stuck, uninspired, or simply want to experience life more deeply, this is your opportunity to reframe your understanding of what truly matters.

If you’re ready to stop searching and start living, this is where it begins.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Cirak is a five-time author and the creator of InnerPower™ Spiritual Teachings. He is a certified meditation, Reiki, and Qi Gong teacher, a graduate of the Eckhart Tolle School of Awakening, and has been featured on over 100 podcasts. With over 25 years of experience, Cirak brings consciousness into everyday living. His deep insights and passionate storytelling make every event memorable.

events.title: Handpan Foundations Training 20Hr
events.description:
This Handpan Foundations Training is a 20-hour program designed for individuals interested in developing a structured and comprehensive introduction to handpan playing. Suitable for complete beginners as well as those with some previous experience, the training focuses on building a solid technical and musical foundation through progressive and practical learning.

Over the course of the training, participants will explore a broad range of handpan skills and musical concepts, including rhythmic and melodic patterns, hand independence, coordination, timing and practical approaches to improvisation. Fundamental playing techniques are introduced as supportive tools within a wider learning process focused on developing fluency and confidence on the instrument.

Different approaches to playing will be explored, including rhythmic, melodic, and meditative styles, with attention also given to meditative and repetitive structures and patterns that support relaxation.

Through individual and group exercises, guided practice, and structured exploration, participants gradually develop confidence, musicality, and increasing autonomy in their playing.

No prior musical training is required. Handpans are provided for use during the training.

Upon completion, participants will have acquired a broader technical and musical foundation, enabling them to play independently, create simple compositions and improvisations, and continue developing a sustainable personal practice.

Participants are asked to bring comfortable clothing, a notebook if useful, and a willingness to engage in focused and consistent practice.

events.title: Breath of Life - A Yogic Pranayama Workshop
events.description:
Our breath and proper breath techniques are the key to health, vitality, calmness of mind, and emotional equanimity in life. It prepares the body & mind to more easily access deeper states of meditation and is essential on the path of deepening a Yoga practice. We can use Pranayama techniques to ease overactive emotions as they arise, as well as to gently uncover and release old, stuck emotions.

This workshop covers the basic philosophies, effects, contraindications and proper techniques of a variety of beginner to intermediate classical Hatha Yoga Pranayamas. We will explore cooling, calming breath techniques to ease and release feelings like anger; warming, active techniques to burn away feelings like lethargy and depression; grounding techniques for when you are feeling unpresent or anxious; as well as techniques for overall balance. Come breathe your way to bliss!

Greg has been teaching and practicing Yoga since 2004 with many great masters worldwide. Drawing on a deep well of knowledge and experience from many traditions, as well as his own developed intuition, Greg lightheartedly adapts each class, technique, and moment for the needs of the students. His deepest wish is that each one of us realize our own innate beauty, and experience contentment; not as a future concept, but as the full acceptance and present moment embodiment of our own unique spirit.

events.title: The Art of Sound Healing
events.description:
The long journey of Agustian Supriatna took him to navigate through different cultures and ancient traditions around the globe. Always curious and thirsty for understanding through direct experience and experimentation.

The Art of Sound Healing condenses the various teachings he has been picking up for years, ready to be shared. It is an alluring music experience that takes the audience to the inner healing journey with ancient Sanskrit mantras, Sufi chanting, Javanese and Sundanese traditional lullabies. While using these sacred scriptures, he composes the music with his own voice and colours. Agustian surprises with new sounds and a variety of music instruments such as bansuri (Indian bamboo flute), suling (Sundanese bamboo flute), karinding (Sundanese bamboo jaw harp), tabla (Indian drum), gambus (Sumatrans oud), ngoni (west African harp), Tibetan singing bowls and so on. He is constantly searching for new instruments or even making and adapting them himself. In concert, he will delight everyone with his magical voice and music while leading other amazing musicians who join him in this journey.

He has found that music is the best media to channel his heritage as a healer as well as sharing his art and heart, to everyone open and willing to dive into themselves.

As you delve into this aromatic adventure, you will be encouraged to reflect on your current emotional state and intuition, allowing you to select the essences that best align with your personal journey. With hands-on blending sessions, you will step into the role of alchemist, crafting a face-body oil tailored specifically to your needs, desires, and intentions. This blend is more than just an oil; it symbolizes your commitment to self-love and self-care.

It will also incorporate mindfulness practices, guided meditations, an Oracle of Essences reading and self-connection with chakras, fostering a holistic approach to well-being that promotes deep self-awareness. By the end of the experience, not only will you walk away with a beautiful, personalized oil, but you will also carry with you newfound tools for nurturing your emotional well-being. Join us for this enriching workshop and take this empowering step toward embracing self-love and healing through the art of aromatherapy and intuitive creation.

Please bring a pen, use whatever makes you comfortable as we will be working sitting on cushions on the floor, and bring what you need to stay hydrated. We're waiting for you with excitement to explore something new!

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Founded in 2018 by visionary Carla Benites on the magical island of Bali, Love Pure emerged from a deep personal journey of self-discovery. Driven by her passion for exploring the intricate relationship between emotions and the effects of plant essences, Carla sought to create a brand that invites people to embrace their authentic selves and receive the pure energy of nature.

Carla believes that by identifying and releasing repressed emotions we can discover the path to personal freedom and inner peace.

Love Pure embodies a deep reverence for the earth. We harness the power of natural ingredients, ensuring each product resonates with purity and intention. Love Pure is more than just a brand; is a movement that encourages people to nourish their hearts and souls while honoring the planet.

events.title: Qi Abdominal Release Level 1: Self-Care
events.description:
Qi Abdominal Release - Level 1: Self- Care

Discover the transformative power of Qi Abdominal Release Self-Massage

Feeling overwhelmed by stress, emotional blockages, or constant tension in your belly? These issues can significantly impact your health, leading to poor digestion, constipation, and bloating.

Discover Ancient Healing Techniques

In this empowering Level 1 Self-Care Training, you’ll uncover the secrets of ancient techniques designed to detoxify your organs, enhance gut health, and release deep-seated tension.

Benefits of Qi Abdominal Release

 
 Emotional Release: Free stored emotions, bringing balance and well-being to your emotional health.

 
 
 Enhance Gut Health: Tackle digestive issues such as poor digestion, constipation, and bloating with precise abdominal massage techniques.

 
 
 ⁠Detoxify Your Organs: Cleanse and rejuvenate your body's vital systems for overall health and vitality.

 
 
 ⁠Stress Reduction: Soothe your mind and body, reduce stress, and promote relaxation.

 
 
 ⁠Enhanced Circulation: Boost blood flow in your abdominal area, supporting digestive and organ health.

 
 
 Pain Relief: Alleviate abdominal discomfort and related health issues.

 
 
 Boost Energy Levels: Unblock your body's natural energy flow to regain vitality.

 
 
 Strengthen Immunity: Enhance your immune system through improved organ function and stress reduction.

 

Your Experience

 
 Soothe and Rebalance: Explore the holistic benefits of self-massage that contribute to overall well-being. Balance your digestive health, alleviate abdominal discomfort, and harmonize your body's natural rhythms through gentle, nurturing techniques.

 
 
 ⁠Empower: Master self-massage techniques that offer physical relief while enhancing your emotional and spiritual well-being.

 
 
 Wisdom of an Expert: Receive guidance from an empathetic and experienced practitioner skilled in the art of abdominal massage. Valerie will share valuable insights and techniques in a supportive environment, creating a personalized and enriching learning experience.

 
 
 Interactive and Intuitive Learning: Engage in a blend of hands-on practice and insightful demonstrations focusing on the abdomen as a vital energy center.

 

Join us to master the secrets of self-healing and transform your quality of life. This Qi Abdominal Release Self-Massage Training is not just about learning techniques—it's about empowering yourself to take charge of your health and happiness.

Contraindications:

 
 If you are pregnant,

 
 
 Had an operation in your abdominal area less than a year ago

 
 
 If you are wearing an IUD

 

This class is suitable for most fitness levels. However, if you have any specific health concerns or conditions, please consult with your healthcare provider before attending.

What to Bring

 
 Towel: For comfort during the workshop.

 
 
 Comfortable Clothes: Wear something you can move easily in. Please avoid dresses or jumpsuits, as we will be working on the abdominal area.

 

Sign up now and Enhance your quality of life and start your journey to wellness today.

 

ABOUT THE TEACHER

Valerie's Transformative Path: From Healing to Empowering Others

Valerie's journey into the healing arts began with a personal quest. Facing post-traumatic stress after surgery, she discovered the ancient art of Taoist Abdominal Massage, a turning point that led not only to her own healing but also to a profound change in her life's direction.

Embracing the powerful impact of this practice, Valerie dedicated herself to mastering it Her personal transformation inspired a commitment to share these life-changing techniques, culminating in the founding of Tao Valley. Here, she has trained hundreds in Qi Abdominal Release, impacting countless lives.

events.title: ABUELA LUNA
events.description:
Come gather together for a ritually charged evening of music and movement to nourish the heart and elevate the soul. This is medicine music to move you, wild and free, sacred and fun.  Inspired by the loving spirit of Cacao, we reconnect as soul-family to elevate our awareness and celebrate the simple miracle of being alive at this powerfully transformational time. We’ll be holding a sacred fire to plant prayer-seeds and anchor intentions for the coming season, sing our hearts wide open, rewild and release.

The musical magic carpet weaves soulful vocals with Spanish guitar, kamel'ngoni grooves, tribal percussion, spacious electric guitar, analog drum machines and synths, and some shouts of joy along the way. Sharing both original songs and some tribal favorites, expect to become part of the band as we lift off together on a magical night!

Raio will be joined by an ensemble of stellar musicians including Carlos Romero, Ryan Narayan, Rob Recker, and Sky on guitar.

 

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Raio is a musician, producer, medicine man and DJ who’s been uplifting the tribe in Bali for the last 18 years. A devotee of movement and dance as transformational practices, he plays organic-electro live dance music sets and DJ’s ecstatic dance. He also leads sacred cacao ceremonies, medicine music concerts, and sound healing journeys, and produces music in a riverside jungle studio outside Ubud.    Along with his wife Sophie Sofree, he’s the co-founder of Wakamaia School of Sacred Fun, where they share the art of Ecstatic Dance DJ’ing, sound healing, and more.  Dedicated to presenting earth-reverent projects that heal and unite, Raio is also co-founder of an eco-community as well as Colibri Spirit Festival and BaliSpirit Festival.

events.title: Intro to Kundalini
events.description:
"Since ancient times humans have found that they have zillions of thoughts, billions of feelings, millions of emotions, thousands of desires, hundreds of fantasies, and multi realities and personalities. Ultimately our mind and thoughts rule and bog us down. We try every method available to get rid of this pressure because it is eating us up inside. White Tantric Kundalini Yoga enables you to break through those subconscious blocks, so you can enjoy life.... This is the path to personal freedom and awareness, and will bring more success to every area of your life." ~ Yogi Bhajan

Join Greg Kaps for an introductory workshop into this ancient mind/body/spirit purification and harmonization practice. We will explore the basic principles of White Tantric Philosophy, energetic anatomy, purification techniques and meditation, giving an understanding of the foundations of this time-tested practice. We will then complete a full practice to experience the liberation and balancing of our internal energies and close with a long relaxation.

events.title: The Art of Teaching
events.description:
This workshop is designed to support you to be the most epic, authentic and inspirational yoga teacher possible.

In this full day I will share tips, tricks and tools that I have learned during my 13 years of teaching literally 1000’s of students and 100’s of yoga teachers. This is what I wish I had learned at the beginning of my teaching journey. The workshop is valuable for how you show up in the world, including your work and intimate relationships.

• Learn a range of different sequencing templates

• Unique ways to theme and develop a class plan

• Practice teaching to the 5 koshas

• Tips for Adjustments and Assists

• Vocal activation techniques to speak from a place of inner authority

• Explore your pedagogical approach: It is time to innovate and explore how we can teach yoga in a real, authentic and engaging way.

• Drop the jargon and simplify your teaching vocabulary to be able to give clear and effective cues

• Develop a confident, natural teaching style applicable for sharing your passion, whether that be teaching yoga or anything else

• Considerations for teaching specific populations (e.g refugees, religious practitioners, recovering addicts, stress and anxiety, trauma etc)

• Receive a template for Restorative Yoga to add another style of yoga to your teaching compendium

About Bex: Over the last 12 years of teaching at The Yoga Barn Bex has taught literally tens of thousands of yoga practitioners and trained hundreds of yoga teachers. As a result, she has a wealth of tools to share with you that come from practical experience and cross-cultural diversity. She loves supporting people to teach their passion, to find their message, and tell it in a way that can be heard.

events.title: Biodynamic Osteopathy
events.description:
A self-adjustment class to align the spine, joints & nervous system

Where physical therapy meets exploration to unwind the “cell-f!” In this class, 22+ year experienced practitioner as seen in Massage Magazine, Carey Benenson, Master Osteopath, will guide the group to align the body from tooth to toe by guiding visceral lengthening techniques, fascial streaming movements & nervous system rewiring exercises inspired by traditional and modern Osteopathic principles as well as oceanic body movement to music. Participants will experience moments of self-correction of the posture/body, mind, and spirit while flossing their spines to hydrate the discs and the nervous system. Slow yet intense stretches and integrative movement will be to explored allowing participants to get taller, freer in their bodies, with lasting results!

Good for all levels. Excellent for people who feel like they need a spinal adjustment, would like to enhance their movement practices and/or those who are dealing with chronic discomfort, stress & misalignment in the muscular skeletal body or in any of the 5 major systems: head/mood/hormones (nervous system,) heart/lungs (cardiorespiratory,) digestion (gastrointestinal,) pelvis and kidneys (urogenital,) and immune boosting (lymphatic system.)

Restorative and dynamic! Beneficial also for people who may not be struggling with pain but who are seeking to improve and maximize their movement practices as they learn movements & anatomical references that teach them how to lengthen or deepen their poses.

Nervous system reprogramming practices & guided craniosacral holds are applied to help the brain find a sense of ease and belonging through journeying & rewiring with the anatomy through moving & still meditation. This slow to still movement meditation known as allbodypoetry™ stimulates a soothing inner alchemy that aims to support the true nature of the family line, the immune system, and the full self like the old renaissance masters who recognised the full person as being important in supporting health.

All based on traditional osteopathic principles and according to the three anatomies of the Three Bodies Method™. You will learn techniques to take home! The theory of this course will be outlined in a slide show presentation backed by science to support the idea that knowledge stimulates greater healing potential. This is also an optional touch class as sometimes the facilitator applies soft alignment work.

First time ever at The Yoga Barn!

Before and after photos of self are recommended!

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Carey “Katerin” Benenson D.O. (M.P.,) D.O. (DSc) holds dual diplomas in Osteopathy and Osteopathic Science from Collège d'Études Ostéopathiques. She is the communications coordinator for the Registro degli Osteopati d’Italia (ROI,) and completed continuing education studies with Harvard University. She is published annually in Massage Magazine.

In 2016, Carey gained recognition her teachings on Lyme Disease, featured by Bastyr University. She has presented alongside the Department of Defense and for the BCST/NA at their Breath of Life Conference. She studied with Emilie Conrad of the Continuum Movement and is known for her Three Bodies Method™ that merges the biodynamic and biomechanics. In September 2025, she will launch the BOMT (Biodynamic OMT) Program worldwide.

events.title: Shadow Dance
events.description:
🔥 SHADOW DANCE 🔥

A Deep, Dark, and Sensual Dance Journey. 🖤

A safe space for you to explore the depths of your embodied expression. 🙏

Giving you permission to fully embody all parts of yourself, guided by deep, dark, and delicious music that evokes raw, primal emotions and sensations. 🔥

The deepest, darkest, and most delicious dance floor in town! 💃🏻✨

Listen to the last Shadow Dance here: https://soundcloud.com/toltech1/shadow-21

ABOUT THE ARTIST

TOLTECH is a DJ and Master of Ceremony. He is passionate about creating fully embodied experiences that allow you to drop into your primal nature, and to connect with your truth and essence. ✨

Combining his deep loves and passions of music, dance, movement, ceremony, tantra, and community, he will guide you on a powerful journey with dark and sexy bass music, to ignite your soul. 🔥

~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~

• A safe space for embodied and emotional expression. Your tears, laughter, screams, joy, and pain are all welcome.

• This is a non-verbal space. Please leave all conversation outside. NO TALKING ON THE DANCE FLOOR.

• This is a phone-free space. Please do not use your phone in the space. NO PHOTO OR VIDEO.

• Respect yourself, and respect one another. You are encouraged to dance with other people, if you feel. You are encouraged to dance alone, if you feel. Listen to your body and your heart and follow what it true for you.

• If someone wants to dance with you, and you want to be in your own space, simply give them a "prayer hands" or "Namaste" gesture. This means "No thank you." 🙏

events.title: Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA)
events.description:
Integrated Kundalini Awakening – A Life-Altering Energy Transmission

During this event, you'll receive a direct energy transmission, awakening your Kundalini Shakti – the latent, divine, and healing energy within every individual. This awakening triggers a remarkable rewiring of your brain and central nervous system, leading to profound emotional and spiritual healing, often unattainable through other means.

As the raw Kundalini life force awakens and surges through your spine, you'll embark on a path to uncover your truest, most powerful, and divine self. This energy purges stored blockages within your energy system, guiding you toward transcendence and elevating your consciousness. It's a journey of rebirth, love, and surrender.

What Can You Expect During a Session? Lie down on a comfortable mat as soothing music plays in the background. The facilitator may gently touch or press certain chakras and meridian points on your body or use hand movements above you. Internally, a wide range of experiences may unfold, from spontaneous movements and emotional release to vivid lights, visuals, and a sense of bliss. Many describe it as a purifying experience, offering deep insights and realizations that lead to physical, mental, energetic, and emotional release. It's a transformative journey beyond the reach of mere words.

Kundalini energy clears accumulated blockages in your energy system, promotes the development of all energy centers, brings clarity and self-understanding to life, restores inner strength and self-confidence, increases energy potential, which leads to financial expansion, enhances sexuality, cultivates a state of happiness, and promotes harmony and tranquility. After a certain number of sessions you will feel more alive and orgasmic.

IMPORTANT: This is not Kundalini yoga session and meditation. This is a life force energy awakening where you can experience strong emotional or physical release, an energetic shift or a visual download. Get ready for a transformative journey.

Before the Session:

 
 Arrive a few minutes early to get settled.

 
 
 Wear loose, comfortable clothing, avoiding clothing with metal zippers or snaps down the front.

 
 
 Consider eating lightly or not at all before the session; an empty stomach is ideal, but a light snack such as fruit is acceptable.

 
 
 If you consume meat, try to refrain from it in the days leading up to the session.

 
 
 Avoid coffee, alcohol, or other substances prior to the class.

 

 
 This session can only be joined by adults 16+

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Anna Sohana has dedicated her life to helping others awaken their inner potential and activate the Divine within themselves.

Her grounded and embodied approach to spiritual practices allows everyone to dive deeply into self-discovery and personal transformation.

Anna has been practicing many forms of Holistic Healing for over 20 years. She is a Certified Yoga Teacher, Body Therapist, Musically Trained Sound Healing Practitioner, Breathwork Facilitator, Certified Astrologer and Facilitator of Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA).

Anna offers shamanic ceremonies, groups, private sessions and education. Her global mission is to change people's understanding of their relationship with themselves and the world around them, to enable them to create a life based on their fundamental needs for joy and freedom.

events.title: Elemental Resonance: A Sound Journey Through Body, Earth & Cosmos
events.description:
Enter a space where rhythm, breath, and tone reconnect you to your inner landscape.

Guided by the elements — Earth, Fire, Water, Air, and Ether — this immersive sound journey invites you to move through layers of being: from the grounded wisdom of the body, to the fluid rhythms of nature, and into the vast silence of the cosmos within.

Through the resonance of drums, strings, voice, Tibetan bowls, flutes, and stillness, you’ll be gently guided through a transformational arc:

• 🌍 Root into Earth with grounding rhythms and steady pulse

• 🔥 Awaken inner fire through voice, vibration, and chant

• 💧 Flow with water through melody and emotional release

• 🌬 Expand with air and ether into spaciousness and clarity

• 🌌 Integrate in stillness, where deep listening begins

Each stage is woven with subtle verbal guidance to help you tune in, soften, and attune to your own process of healing and realignment.

Come as you are.

Leave resonant, rooted, and at ease.

ABOUT THE ARTISTS

Anna & Catur are the dynamic duo behind Yoga Sound Alchemy, crafting offerings that blend music, mantra, yoga, dance, and drumming. Catur, a world musician and sound nomad from Indonesia, masters over twenty instruments and founded Ubud Drum in Bali. His deep study of traditional music, including time in Mali, shapes his compositions, drawing from diverse global traditions. Anna, a multifaceted artist, harmonizes her love for family, nature, dance, music, and spiritual pursuits. Her studies in Sanskrit, Mantra meditation, and Vedic chanting fuel her passion for Sacred Sounds. Founder of Matangi, an all-female drumming and singing band, Anna's musical journey was enriched by her partnership with Catur.

events.title: Handpan Training
events.description:
This Introductory Handpan Training is a 10-hour, two-day program designed for yoga teachers, meditation practitioners, and individuals interested in integrating sound into contemplative and body-based practices. The training focuses on using the handpan as a supportive musical presence, particularly during savasana and moments of rest, rather than on performance or technical virtuosity.

Over the course of the training, participants are introduced to fundamental handpan playing techniques, including posture, touch, tone production, and hand coordination. Simple rhythmic and melodic patterns are explored with an emphasis on steadiness, repetition, and attentive listening within a group environment.

Special attention is given to the practical use of sound in yoga and meditation settings, including sensitivity to pacing, volume, and duration, as well as the relationship between sound, silence, and breath. Participants are guided in developing a calm and reliable musical presence that can support relaxation and transition into stillness in a class context.

No prior musical training is required. Professional handpans are provided for use during the training.

Upon completion, participants will have acquired a foundational technical and perceptual skill set suitable for accompanying savasana, relaxation phases, and personal contemplative practice.

Participants are asked to bring comfortable clothing, a notebook if useful, and a willingness to engage in focused listening and reflective practice.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Edoardo Striani is an award-winning astrophysicist and international handpan player from Italy. He began playing the handpan in 2012 and has been working full-time as a handpan teacher and performer since 2017. He has led hundreds of workshops and trainings across Europe and Asia, including in Italy, Switzerland, Germany, Luxembourg, Belgium, Russia, Singapore, Hong Kong, China, and Indonesia. Edoardo is a recognized figure in the international handpan community, known for both his technical skills and his passion for teaching and inspiring new players.

events.title: Relearn Love
events.description:
Sundays | 2:30pm - 4:30pm

You probably learned about love before you were old enough to question it. From your parents, your culture, and your favorite movies and songs, you absorbed a set of stories about what love should look like, what a good partner does, what you’re allowed to feel, and what you deserve in love. You never chose those stories. You just started living them.

Relearn Love is not a lecture. It is a live, guided experience that takes you inside the patterns shaping how you love right now, and shows you that a different way is possible.

In two hours together, you will look back at where your patterns began, understand why certain dynamics keep showing up in your relationships, and leave with new relationship tools, skills, and a genuinely new way of seeing yourself and the people you love.

Most high-achievers have invested deeply in their careers, their health, and their personal growth. This is the missing piece that will have a ripple effect into every area of your life.

Eri Kardos is a TEDx speaker, bestselling author, and founder of Relearn Love, a private relational consulting practice. She has taught this work on six continents to thousands of people. She and her husband, Jaymin Patel, are based in Bali with their two children. This is her favorite class to teach.

Explore the depth of your consciousness and enter a world of possibilities, with roXiva.

Roxiva, also known as a hypnagogic light machine or audio-visual brainwave entrainment (BWE), is a light and sound therapy device that uses white strobe lights and sound sessions to help users achieve relaxed or inspired states of mind. While most people have positive experiences and mild side effects that quickly go away, there are some precautions to take:

 
 Caffeine, alcohol and other substances: Avoid combining Roxiva with caffeine, alcohol or recreational substances.

 
 
 Pregnancy: Do not use Roxiva if you are pregnant.

 
 
 Epilepsy: The flashing strobe lights could set off a seizure, please refrain from using this technology if you are epileptic.

 
 
 Short-term effects: For a short time after a session, you may feel a little distant or different, similar to a mini-trance.

 

Please be on time. There will be no time tolerance for late arrivals.

events.title: Sound Bath Frequency Experience
events.description:
What is Sound Bath?

A sound bath is the definition of deep immersion. This is a meditative listening experience where sound is used with the intention of creating a full-body restorative process. The goal is to nourish the mind and body by being bathed in sound waves.

Sound baths are a passive practice where all you need to know is to lay down or sit comfortably and receive.

Recipients can use a blanket and eye mask to enhance the experience.

 

Should you try a Sound Bath?

This is a great option for you if:

 
 You are looking for a relaxing practice

 
 
 You want to ease into mindfulness in a way that doesn’t require skills

 
 
 You love sensorial experiences

 
 
 Music is a passion or object of curiosity for you

 
 
 You want to decrease anxiety and stress

 
 
 You are new to mindfulness

 
 
 You want to discover the way stillness can serve your way of living

 
 
 Trying a new way to meditate sounds interesting to you

 

Everyone can experience and benefit from sound baths. It’s not a shocking or confronting practice and requires no physical fitness. All you have to do is lay down and be.

 

The benefits of Sound Baths?

On a mental health level, sound baths are able to ignite a state of harmony and peace in the recipients, which naturally promotes relaxation through life, awareness, and a strong sense of well-being. It can reduce stress, anxiety, and depression symptoms, as well as dissipate tension, anger, distress, and confusion. It is possible for some people to experience a visionary or breakthrough moment.

Sound baths can potentially aid in your body’s healing process as well. For example, blood pressure and heart rate might be subject to improvement.

 

Where does the practice of Sound Baths come from?

This is a practice that is deep-rooted in the principles of sacred geometry and the teachings of quantum physics. The modality in which sound waves are used for healing derives from ancient traditions and in modern days its properties for development have been proven.

 

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Sebastian Cuevas a.k.a. Sebatierra is a Chilean multi-instrumentalist, songwriter, music producer and sound healer based in Ubud.

Founder of several iconic bands from Chile.

He has collaborated with different, national and international bands recording and producing, supporting healing music for more than 20 years., Performing world wide in several Festivals.

For the last 20 years, Sebatierra has guided sound and crystal healings, he also is a Reiki master in Karuna and Usui Method.

events.title: Mala Making Workshop
events.description:
Sacred Rudraksha: Mala Creation & Activation Workshop

Saturdays, June 06th & 13th

Time : 11:00am - 01:30pm

Price: IDR 750,000

 

“In the yogic tradition, Rudraksha are considered as the "Tears of Shiva," and are much more than just a piece of jewellery, they are considered an instrument for spiritual transformation.”

Creating your own Mala is an extraordinary experience in Bali, made so by the potency and divine energy of the Rudraksha seeds.

Like a Rosary, a spiritual Rudraksha Mala that is used for prayer and meditation typically consists of 108 beads. In the Hindu tradition, it is believed that anyone who wears these beads has the blessings of all the three divine Hindu gods i.e., Brahma, Vishnu, and Mahesh, with him. In addition, it is believed that Rudraksha absorb and amplify positive energies, help individuals to align with their intentions, while increasing spiritual connection, reducing stress, and enhancing overall well-being.

In this workshop, we invite you to experience Bali on a deeper level and guide you in creating your personal Mala, where you will string your intentions together to generate the energy you need to transform personally. 

You will be able to learn more about the benefits of the Rudraksha, and gemstones, as you thread your personalized Sacred Mala. 

The visual beauty and known energetic influence of the Rudraksha beads, combined with the variety of precious gems, are made all the more significant by your handpicked selection. 

At the workshop's end, we sit with a Balinese priest to bless our Rudraksha Malas and activate them.

Join this joyful and meaningful workshop hosted by Aum Rudraksha Design at The Yoga Barn.

events.title: The Cocoon Experience
events.description:
The Cocoon Method is a gentle nervous system regulation journey that weaves together soft movement, conscious breathing, grounding body awareness, subtle bodywork, energy work and deeply relaxing sound. We begin with simple movement to help the body arrive, followed by an embodied understanding of the nervous system and how we can guide ourselves back into balance. From there we enter a guided breathing practice supported by gentle touch, bodywork and energy work cues that help the body soften, release and regulate itself naturally. The session closes in a sound journey that allows the parasympathetic state to deepen and integrate. This is a soft, feminine and very accessible approach that you can take home into your daily life, offering simple tools to come back home into calm, clarity and inner balance in an everyday way.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Nina Hinterschitt is the founder of The Cocoon Method, a trauma-informed healing approach that combines breathwork therapy, bodywork, energy healing, Internal Family Systems (IFS), and nervous system regulation. With over 15 years of experience, her background includes somatic movement, yoga therapy, pelvic health care, and Reiki Mastery. Nina facilitates deep emotional and physical transformations, helping individuals reconnect with their bodies and emotions in a safe space. Based in Bali, she offers international trainings, retreats, and one-on-one healing sessions.

events.title: FRIDAY Ecstatic Dance
events.description:
5th June featuring SOPHIE SÔFRĒĒ

 

Sophie Sôfrēē was born at BaliSpirit Festival ~ with her opening debut 8 years ago which lit a flame that still burns brightly. She serves up a sacred fun approach to Ecstatic Dance DJ’ing, encouraging dancers to liberate bodies through the vehicle of music. Weaving a broad span of musical flavors ranging from ethnic african rhythms, cumbia, melodic ethnic house to funky spunky flavors. Blending this range of global dance tracks with her infectious energy and embodied feminine wisdom, she’s recognized for creating beautiful spaces for sacred celebration and healing.

Listen to Sophie Sôfrēē here: https://soundcloud.com/djsofree/tracks

 

Friday Ecstatic Dance | 7:15 - 9:00 pm

Ecstatic Dance is an internal experience. Dance yourself free & let go, this experience is all for YOU.

IMPORTANT  ECSTATIC DANCE ETIQUETTE!

Please respect these rules.

 Age Limits: For safety & liability reasons, Children under the age of 12 are not allowed to join ecstatic dance, as the dance floor is very crowded. Thank you for understanding.

  
 Note STUDIO CAPACITY/LIMITATIONS:

  
 Upstairs (capacity 170)  180K 

  
 Downstairs (capacity 100) 100K

  
 Those dancing downstairs will NOT BE ABLE TO COME UPSTAIRS once upstairs capacity is reached. 

  
 RESPECT the staff & each other.

  
 STAY SILENT. NO TALKING in the studios, or on the upper deck.  (Talking allowed outside only)

  
 NO PHONES! NO PHOTOGRAPHY & NO VIDEOGRAPHY.  (exceptions are made only with permission from the management).

  
 Leave your phones turned off & in your bags 

  
 NO alcohol or altering substances permitted.

  
 RESPECT THE DRESS CODE: Bikinis / G-strings /   Speedos / Nipple Clips are not clothing.... 

  
 PLEASE WEAR CLOTHES, this is not a play party.

  
 NO SHOES on the dance floor.

  
 RESPECT PERSONAL BOUNDARIES -- yours and others.

  
 BE ACCOUNTABLE FOR YOUR ACTIONS, it takes two to Tango.

IMPORTANT:

Aggressive behaviour will NOT BE TOLERATED, and you will be asked to leave if you violate any of the above Rules & Etiquette.

The Yoga Barn security & management team is looking out for your safety. Appreciate them & listen to them, they are doing their job.

Please do your part to keep the dance floor a safe space for all members of our community.

Enjoy!

______________

BOOK & PAY ONLINE:

Megatix is available to purchase on the Monday before the event.

Prices for Ecstatic Dance: 

Friday Ecstatic Dance | 7:15 - 9:00 pm | IDR 180,000 (includes Megatix fees)

Online Megatix:  IDR 180,000 (upstairs - Nyoman)

Walk-in: IDR 180,000 (upstairs - Nyoman)

Walk-in: IDR 100,000 (downstairs - Ketut)

(Walk-in Guests please arrive 1 hour before; limit 1 ticket per person for walk-in guests)

Book and Pay for your spot online, check-in, and pick-up your wristband on-site the day of the event from 8:00 am-7:15 pm.

NOTES ON CAPACITY:

There are TWO STUDIOS to dance in: UPSTAIRS / NYOMAN & DOWNSTAIRS / KETUT. 

The upstairs studio has a maximum capacity of 170 people. 

The downstairs studio has a maximum capacity of 100 people

ONCE THOSE CAPACITIES ARE HIT the doors will be considered closed.

TO ACCESS THE UPSTAIRS, PURCHASING IN ADVANCE, ON MEGATIX, IS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.

When attempting a purchase through Megatix, if the dance appears to be SOLD OUT, it's actually NOT sold out. 

It actually means that PRE-SALES are sold out, and that the only other tickets available are WALK-IN. Usually there are still approximately 15-25 spaces left for upstairs and at least 75 for downstairs .

THERE IS PLENTY OF ROOM FOR YOU. So if you miss the pre-sales, just walk-in and pay at reception.

NO REFUNDS.  TRANSFERS ARE ALLOWED WITHIN 14 DAYS. 

To transfer your ticket, contact us at  askme@theyogabarn.com.

CHECK-IN:

Simple and smooth check-in! No more lining up!

Show your e-ticket at the reception desk to pick up your wristband!

The earlier you come, the faster check-in gets.

Check-in on Fridays, for those with online tickets is open from 8:00am - 7.15pm

______________

Each Friday & Sunday, in addition to Ecstatic Dance there is an amazing array of classes to choose from.  Please check our online schedule for the current schedule to see if Ecstatic Dance has been removed/cancelled.  

Our Garden Kafe has a freshly prepared Buffet Lunch on Sundays and is open until 10:00 pm every Friday for you to enjoy a pre-dance or  post-dance meal. 

 

MORE ABOUT ECSTATIC DANCE:

Ecstatic Dance is a global movement active around the world and was launched for the first time in Bali in 2009 by Yoga Barn co-founder Charley Patton.

The Yoga Barn Friday Ecstatic Dance is an all-ages community gathering where you can simply BE yourself and experience freedom through the rhythms of global beats and movement.

Please, come as you are to experience this substance-free, uplifting and happy space of dance and free movement - let your inhibitions melt away. 

During Ecstatic Dance at the Yoga Barn, our DJ will set the mood for you to experience your inner magic through free-form movement.  

Please respect the above Etiquette & Protocols to keep the dance floor a safe space for all members of our Ubud community.

ECSTATIC DANCE is an internal experience. Dance yourself free & let go, no need to try and impress others, this experience is all for you.  

ENJOY!

events.description: Inspired by the Japanese art of Kintsugi, this workshop transforms broken ceramic pieces into meaningful art by highlighting cracks with gold. It's a meditative creative process that reminds us that brokenness does not mean failure, and blessings can arrive in unexpected forms. Learn to adapt, grow, and find new ways forward, embracing imperfections as part of our story. Suitable for those seeking a mindful activity, a sense of togetherness, and a gentle reconnection through creativity and meditation. Participants will experience a guided creative ritual with all materials provided in a calm, supportive space, leaving with a handmade piece and a deeper sense of gratitude, clarity, and perspective. No refunds or exchanges for cancellations.
events.short_description: Hands-on Kintsugi-inspired workshop to transform brokenness into beauty through a meditative creative ritual. Learn to embrace imperfections and find clarity.
